notes: Product home is https://kensaur.us/mushi-mushi — use Supabase or hosted-mcp URLs for MCP upstream.
Smithery was wrongly published with a non-resolving legacy API hostname (missing /mcp path). Delete or republish with upstreamUrl above.
Republish: smithery.ai → kensaurus/mushi-mushi → Releases → Publish → paste upstreamUrl → submit (must be signed in as kensaurus).
After publish: Releases → Connect with a mcp:read test key, or rely on server-card.json for tool metadata.

displayDescription: Your AI shipped it. Mushi tells you why it broke — plain diagnosis and a paste-ready fix prompt in Cursor. No second LLM key.
